name: staged_source_quality_findings
title: Source-quality findings (Track B + C, staged tier)
description: Per-finding rows from the source extract/audit pipeline, EXCLUDING Track D distribution findings (those live in staged_distribution_findings). Anchored to the 2026-04-26 v20d ETL spine checkpoint.

fields.name: track
fields.description: Track ownership derived from the issue prefix. D is forbidden here.

fields.name: issue
fields.description: Snake-case issue code in the source_* namespace.

fields.name: evidence
fields.description: Free-form evidence string; may legitimately be empty for some findings.

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Optional owner attribution; null for unowned findings.
